name: Consumer Credit Counseling Service of Savannah
description_short: CCCS of Savannah is a locally-based nonprofit credit counseling agency providing free debt management, credit counseling, and housing counseling services in the Savannah area for 60 years.
description_long:
Consumer Credit Counseling Service (CCCS) of Savannah has operated as a nonprofit credit counseling agency for over 60 years, serving hundreds of thousands of people in the greater Savannah area. The organization emphasizes its status as the only locally-based nonprofit credit counseling agency in the region, differentiating itself from national chains and for-profit competitors. CCCS of Savannah provides comprehensive financial counseling designed to help families restore their financial health through structured debt management and education.

The agency offers a range of free and low-cost services including debt management programs, credit and budget counseling, housing counseling from certified counselors, and first-time homebuyer assistance. Their Debt Management Plans coordinate with creditors to reduce interest rates and consolidate payments, helping consumers become debt-free. The My Virtual Counselor tool allows clients to estimate savings before meeting with a counselor. All initial consultations are free, and clients can schedule online appointments to discuss their financial situation and options.

CCCS of Savannah distinguishes itself through its nonprofit status, certified counselors, and emphasis on a judgment-free environment. The organization explicitly positions itself as focused on helping people restore financial health rather than generating profits. Their success stories document clients who paid off significant debts (such as $20,000 in credit card debt over 4 years), received professional guidance during business closures and pay cuts, and experienced improved credit terms through negotiation. Staff members are repeatedly praised for courtesy, professionalism, and personalized service in client testimonials.

As a nonprofit counseling agency, CCCS of Savannah is best suited for consumers seeking education and structured repayment plans rather than those needing aggressive debt settlement or immediate debt elimination. The service model requires commitment to multi-year payment plans and assumes clients have sufficient income to participate in debt management. While highly regarded locally, the organization's reach is geographically limited to the Savannah area, and results depend on creditor willingness to negotiate.
address: 7505 Waters Ave STE C10, Savannah, GA 31406

pros: Nonprofit status with 60-year history serving hundreds of thousands, emphasizing restoration over profit
Free initial consultations and free budgeting/credit counseling sessions available
Only locally-based nonprofit credit counseling agency in Savannah area, providing personalized community-focused service
Certified housing counselors available for foreclosure avoidance and first-time homebuyer programs
My Virtual Counselor tool allows self-assessment of debt management plan savings before committing
Documented success with debt consolidation—clients report paying off $20K+ debts and renegotiated favorable rates
Judgment-free environment explicitly emphasized, with consistent praise for courteous and professional staff in testimonials
cons: Geographic limitation—services available only in Savannah area, not a national organization
Debt management plans require multi-year commitment; not suitable for those needing immediate debt elimination
Depends on creditor cooperation for rate reductions and payment restructuring—outcomes vary by creditor
No information provided on typical success rates, average time to debt freedom, or fee structures beyond 'free' counseling
Website does not specify APR reductions, typical creditor participation rates, or qualification criteria for debt management plans
best_for: Savannah-area residents with maxed-out credit cards seeking structured repayment and creditor negotiation
Homeowners interested in foreclosure prevention or first-time homebuyer programs with certified counseling
People with stable income who can commit to multi-year debt management plans and need judgment-free financial guidance
diagnosis: CCCS of Savannah is ideal for Savannah-area residents with manageable income who have credit card debt and want structured, nonprofit-guided repayment plans with creditor negotiation. The main caveat is that results depend on creditor cooperation, plans require multi-year commitment, and the organization is geographically limited to the Savannah region.
services: Free debt management programs with creditor negotiation and consolidated payments
Free credit and budget counseling with action plan creation
My Virtual Counselor online tool for debt management savings estimation
Debt collector call mitigation through debt management enrollment
